comment.body: @ntnguyen1234 I believe this site is part of [Rogers Media](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/1b4dab773615715ec5737c85900a00a0ddbe2e5b/BaseFilter/sections/specific.txt#L21389). I also noticed many of the other domains seem to redirect to it. I didn't test them all, so I'm not sure whether they all do or only some.

issue.title: www.eclipso.eu

labels.name: A: Waiting for data
labels.description: Waiting for more information from the user

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://www.eclipso.eu/start.php?sid=(...)](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.eclipso.eu%2Fstart.php%3Fsid%3D%28...%29) ### Comment > Placeholders above and to the right of the main interface. I propose: > ``` > eclipso.eu###mainBanner > eclipso.eu###rightBanner > eclipso.eu##div.withBanner:remove-class(withBanner) > ! May or may not require changing the window width to see the placeholder of. > eclipso.eu###mainContent[style^="right: 160"] { right:0!important } > ``` > > #### Notes from me: > * Testing it requires signing up for an Eclipso E-mail account on their Free plan. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/g8p5sgi73eo0ss88woo0444w8048ok4gfdl65p7glc.png?nc=1)

issue.title: Typosquatting-Protection overblocking
issue.body:
### Platform

iOS

### Protocol

DNS-over-HTTPS

### Do you use AdGuard app?

Yes I am

### Your configuration

_No response_

### Traceroute to AdGuard DNS

_No response_

### Issue Details

Enable Typosquatting-Protection. The following, legitimate domains are getting blocked:

lamy.com (German manufacturer of stationery)
brxcdn.com
vercel-dns (for example vercel-dns-013.com – keep in mind vercel-dns uses numbered servers)
kgns (for example net-edge-z3cvf9xc.kgns4.com – keep in mind kgns uses numbered servers)

### Expected Behavior

All domains listed above seem legitimate. Neither HaGeZi TIF nor internal TIF blocks them and the domains seem to belong to legitimate DNS- and CDN-Providers. Lamy.com belongs to a legitimate company from Germany.

### Actual Behavior

All domains are getting blocked.

### Screenshots

<details><summary>Screenshot 1:</summary>
<!-- paste screenshot here -->
</details>


### Additional Information

_No response_

I have watched few (full) videos and I'm not able to reproduce ads.
Maybe it depends on location, although I also checked with VPN.
Could you please add following rule to user rules and check out if ads are blocked?
```adblock
||imasdk.googleapis.com/js/sdkloader/ima3.js$script,redirect=google-ima3,domain=independent.co.uk,important
```
I'm not sure if it helps, but just trying to figure out something.

comment.body:
Not reproduced on my end.

Please try following actions, then check the problem again:
1. Disable all content blockers in Safari settings and enable them again
2. Restart Safari
3. Restart AdGuard
4. Check for filters update in AdGuard.

### Important:
<!-- **AdGuard for iOS** -->
* Do not close AdGuard window ~60 seconds, because iOS will break configuration process.
<!-- **AdGuard for Safari** -->
* The filters update process is fully completed ~10 seconds after the manual filter update check is completed.

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://v.youku.com/v_show/id_XMzkyNTIzNzI4.html?s=cc0053ea962411de83b1&scm=20140719.apircmd.298639.video_XMzkyNTIzNzI4&spm=a2hkt.13141534.298639.d_1_1](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fv.youku.com%2Fv_show%2Fid_XMzkyNTIzNzI4.html%3Fs%3Dcc0053ea962411de83b1%26scm%3D20140719.apircmd.298639.video_XMzkyNTIzNzI4%26spm%3Da2hkt.13141534.298639.d_1_1) ### Comment > 右边是切换集数的列表；连续切换多次集，比如连续切换10次或者20次，会有那么一两次停留在截图中的状态，然后在背景播放声音版广告（但是没有画面），目前确认是一个概率问题，在剩下的绝大多数情况下，加载1秒后就能正常播放视频。有时候切集遇到广告后，再次刷新一下页面，广告就没有的情况非常常见。仅使用Easylist China列表时，广告可以100%被挡掉，而且切集的时候不需要等待加载1秒。由于Easylist China无法挡下爱奇艺（iqiyi.com）上的视频广告，因此希望Adguard Chinese仅从Easylist China处移植v.youku.com相关内容。 ``` Username: @janson403 ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/895rdb4wtc004k0oswg84sc8g0wo8ckk29q9j8b9fk.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Windows v7.22.8 Browser: | Edge AdGuard driver: | WFP Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter,
AdGuard URL Tracking filter

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter

**Security:**
Online Malicious URL Blocklist

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard Chinese filter,
CJX's Annoyances List Tracking protection: | disabled DNS filtering: | server: `System`, `Default` Browsing Security: | disabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | disabled Userstyles: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.info/settings/import.html?product_type=win&product_version=7.22.8&system_version=&browser=edge&filters=2.11.3.17.18.19.20.21.208.224.220&dns.servers=System%2CDefault&dns.filters_enabled=false&dns.enabled=true&browsing_security.enabled=false&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=false&win.wfp=true)
